content: We can frame an LLM agent's working memory capacity limit as a built-in constraint that the ICM curiosity mechanism can exploit to drive structured, incremental reasoning improvement, rather than viewing working memory limits as purely a harmful flaw. This works because ICM rewards exploration of novel, unprocessed states, which aligns with probing the uncompressed edge of an agent's current working memory upper bound.
source_topics: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
trigger_topic: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
